name: Pineapple Cotton Kids' Sheet Set - Pillowfort™
description: Bring fruity freshness to your kiddo's bed with the Pineapple Cotton Sheet Set from Pillowfort™. Made of a peached-finish, 100% cotton fabric, this printed bedsheet set is decked out in a refreshing pineapple print in golden yellow and green against a solid cream backdrop that brings a dash of cheerful flair to their room. Perfect for year-round use, this fruit-printed sheet set comes with a fitted sheet, flat sheet and matching pillowcase(s) for a complete look. The fully elastic fitted sheet is suitable for mattresses up to 16 inches deep to ensure a snug, secure fit and create a smooth, soft surface for your child to lie on. Machine-washable for easy care and cleaning, this pineapple-printed bedding set is perfect for everyday use — add a solid or printed coverlet or comforter, and complete the look with cute fruit-shaped stuffed pillow buddies.
